final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic Chinese fundraising roadshow announcement.

Style/medium: needs a professional Chinese VC/GP roadshow aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a cover slide layout with prominent headline placement and speaker attribution area
Subject: must include the announcement context of "GPT 5.5 release" and the speaker "奥特曼" (Sam Altman)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, high-stakes pitch atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a professional, trustworthy direction suitable for Chinese institutional investors — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT 5.5" or "GPT5.5" and "奥特曼" prominently
Constraints: must preserve Chinese domestic roadshow conventions and GP-tier professionalism
Avoid: must avoid Western startup clichés, must avoid overly casual or consumer-facing aesthetics
